crossRefs.label: Always check wheel alignment after subframe installation.

items.text: Bolts indicated to be replaced during disassembly shown in the figure should be replaced with new ones.
Bolts indicated to be replaced during disassembly shown in the figure should be replaced with new ones.
When installing the sub-frame, use a screwdriver or similar tool to align the mounting holes (reference holes) of the body and sub-frame as shown in the figure.
When installing the sub-frame, use a screwdriver or similar tool to align the mounting holes (reference holes) of the body and sub-frame as shown in the figure.
Tighten the subframe mounting bolts in numerical order.
Tighten the subframe mounting bolts in numerical order.
Always check wheel alignment after subframe installation.
